ref_contract_no.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

money_type_id.text: ประเภทการจ่าย

begining_of_contract.text: วันที่เริ่มสัญญา

root.sql:
SELECT sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_lon_m_contract.branch_id , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'dd/mm/yyyy') as begining_of_contract_tdate, sc_lon_m_contract.create_entry_id, sc_lon_m_contract.create_entry_date, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.create_entry_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy') as create_entry_tdate, sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy') as start_keep_tdate, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no, ( SELECT rule.loan_type_description FROM sc_lon_m_rule rule WHERE rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no ) as loan_type_description,
sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.paid_first_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_payment_type.loan_payment_type_desc, sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as memname
,coalesce(( SELECT sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ),0) as total_old_loan
,coalesce(( SELECT sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ),0) as int_old_loan
,sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve /*ให้เงินสดขึ้นก่อน*/ ,(case when sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = 'CSH' then '_A' else sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id end )as money_type_sort ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_oldint ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no ,(CASE sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money WHEN 'TRD' THEN pka_com_function.fp_form_depno( sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no ) ELSE '' END) as type_pay_money_trb
FROM sc_lon_m_rule, sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_payment_type , sc_com_m_branch ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_lon_m_loan_request WHERE ( sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_payment_type.loan_payment_type_code ) and (sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status = '1' ) and ( sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_lon_m_contract.branch_id ) and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no = 1 and sc_lon_m_rule.invest_status = '0'
/*WHERE*/ and ( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract between '01/11/2024' and '12/11/2024' ) ORDER BY sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ASC , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ASC , money_type_sort ASC , sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ASC, sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no ASC , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ASC

r_bot_loan_create_by_begindate_nest.sql: SELECT sc_com_m_receipt_item.description, sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.pending_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = {0} ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' )

r_bot_loan_create_by_begindate_nest_clr.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type , count(sc_com_m_receipt_item.description) as count_description, sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount) as sum_interest, sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount) as sum_principal FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_com_m_receipt_item , sc_lon_m_rule WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.description ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'CLR' ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status = '1' ) and sc_lon_m_rule.invest_status = '0' /*WHERE*/ --and ( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract between '01/11/2024' and '12/11/2024' ) GROUP BY sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description
